title: betula rockii
intro: Betula rockii, also known as the Korean Birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Betula rockii have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Betula rockii are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
